title: Lesson 173: (Grammar) - but; however; though; nevertheless; still; yet; ev...

intro_cards.title: Conjunction: でも
intro_cards.body:
でも can mean 'but / however' or 'any ~' depending on context.

1. 'But / However' (sentence connector):
• 行きたかった。でも、時間がなかった。
(I wanted to go. But I didn't have time.)

2. 'Even / Any' (with question words):
• 何でも食べます。(I'll eat anything.)
• 誰でも入れます。(Anyone can enter.)
• いつでもいいです。(Anytime is fine.)

3. Approximate suggestion ('or something'):
• コーヒーでも飲みませんか？
(How about some coffee or something?)
